name: paralog_family_kir
description: Killer-cell Immunoglobulin-like Receptor cluster on chr19q13.4, within the leukocyte receptor complex (LRC). Roughly 150 kb encoding 14 functional KIR genes plus 2 pseudogenes. Gene content varies between haplotypes (A vs B haplotypes; gene copy-number variable). Paralogs share 85-99% identity, especially within the D1/D2/D0 immunoglobulin-like domains. Mapping requires haplotype-aware references; GRCh38 carries a single haplotype, T2T-CHM13 provides an alternate.
